title: Pilot Profile
description: Soul AI pilot profile domain model — persistent skill and history record for a pilot

total_sessions.description: Total number of recorded sessions (real + simulator)

total_flight_time_minutes.description: Total real flight time in minutes

simulator_time_minutes.description: Total simulator session time in minutes

skill_scores.description: Skill metric scores (0.0–1.0 scale, higher is better)

smoothness_score.description: Control input smoothness — penalizes rapid or jerky inputs

approach_consistency_score.description: Consistency of approach path across sessions

altitude_stability_score.description: Proportion of cruise time within ±50ft of target altitude

route_tracking_score.description: Accuracy of route tracking — penalizes lateral deviation

overcorrection_tendency.description: True if pilot frequently overcorrects on inputs

steep_approach_tendency.description: True if pilot consistently approaches steeper than standard

altitude_creep_tendency.description: True if pilot tends to drift from assigned altitude

recent_improvements.description: Human-readable notes on recent performance improvements
